title: knautia lyrophylla
intro: Knautia lyrophylla, also known as the Alpine Knautia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the European alpine regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Knautia lyrophylla include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat gastrointestinal issues and promote overall well-being.
